star_1.text: I purchased FlightView Elite several years ago and it was a very good and reliable app. Now with the updated app to get premium features it requires a subscription, needless to say I hate subscription based apps. If I'm forced now into a subscription it will be a different app since I had paid for FlightView Elite. Web version new design is not as good as the previous version. Clicked on departures and arrivals in both web and phone, Can't find data, try later. I'm not a happy customer.

The latest version is horrible. It's a radical change for the worse. Not only are you forced to create an account, the original function of searching city pairs has been nearly eliminated. Navigation is opaque and the ability to quickly swap destination and origination is completely gone. As a flight attendant I relied on this app several times a day. Whoever thought this was a good idea must have never traveled beyond their village.

What a disgrace. Something that used to work well is utterly useless now. My trip history is gone and I can't save a new trip to monitor my flights. I don't fly a lot but three trips in a row this app has been useless to me. In the past you could save your itinerary and ge t alerts and opening the app see your latest status. Basic. Gone now. And they have the gall to charge $17.99 for absolutely nothing.

Wow, I've been using this app for years and it's horrible now after being updated. It now takes over 3 minutes to open the app (yes I sat their watching the spinning circle for 3 minutes before saying putting down my phone). That right there is a killer when needing quick information. Also, yesterday when tracking a flight I received no notifications for the flight constantly having me have to check the app over and over again. After seeing the other recent reviews, time for a new one.

V5 is garbage. Pressing on a date in the calendar does nothing, as does clicking cancel on the calendar screen, so the app is unusable. You have ruined a perfectly good app and I will be unsubscribing from the paid version immediately. Fools. Note to other users: If nothing happens when you open the app, leave it open and open it again by clicking its icon a second time. Only then will the loading symbol disappear.

Please bring back the widget!!!!! I use the widget all of the time! As a commercial pilot, I used this app every week. Now, most of it is broken, as other users have said. Recommend users go find the previous version (apkpure) that worked (4.0.61) and install that until this gets fixed! To say that version 5.0.0 has some issues is an understatement! It's unusable! So many people have uninstalled it, it's gotta be hard to increase the rating at this point! Had to switch to Plane Finder.

Updated on 16 July 25. Required a password reset - no notification in app, found it on the website. Flights within a trip are NOT sorted in any way and have no way to change the sort order. I want them in the order I'll be taking them - random is useless. Notifications are off by default - must be turned on for each flight, no global setting. It may not have been updated in years, but I'd really rather have the previous version. 30 Nov 25. Now it takes multiple tries to start the app.

DO NOT install-Spam App. Used to be good but now EXTREMELY buggy and the Free version can no longer be used at all. The majority of the time you cannot get past the intrusive advertisements (including vulgar video ads) to get the information you need. You have to "force stop" the app and restart it and hurry to get the info before the advertisements take over the entire app and you have to "force stop" again. ABSOLUTE GARBAGE APP!!

Used to be a pretty good app, except for loud, intrusive ads. Now, after recent updates, it's totally useless. Notifications don't work; map doesn't work; it shows a flight still scheduled, which has now arrived 9 hours later. Among many other things not working. The required one star is one too many.

I've used flightview for many years. It used to work great. With the update this year, this app has become almost useless. The app doesn't load most of the time, status doesn't update properly, and notifications work only rarely. When the app does work, I have little confidence in its accuracy.

I had paid for Flightview Elite and was forced over to this version of the app. It is inefficient and clunky. The other version was very simple. My flights now have to be manually entered, and show up out of order. I hate the default dark mode with no option to change it. The ads are ridiculous. I originally paid for the app to get rid of the ads, and I'm not paying for this app in its current state. I'll be looking for another tracking app.

New update rendered the app basically useless! I have used this app for years. I book dozens of flights every year to keep a traveling man on track. I have always been able to add and track the flights reliably - I often had delays and gate change info before he did, and he was IN the airport! But now, the app can't even track flights properly. Gives the wrong info all the time - says Scheduled when the flight is almost at the destination, says In Air hours before or after the flight. Useless!

As of Nov 24, 2025: Notifications are on in settings. Still not getting notifications. They are not blocked in device, either. Tried to contact customer service through email address from app. Mail server error; site is not longer available. What a joke! Previous Post: As of today all of my saved flights disappeared AGAIN! And now it's impossible to save any flights at all. Their programmers are incompetent. Rating dropped to 1.4. LOL I had used this app for several years. What a waste!

This app USED to work well many years ago. It had no intrusive ads, just a strip of ads at the top or bottom. Flights were easy to add and, I would get alerts. I would not have to log in either. Now, everything is flipped opposite. Intrusive ads, the first flight takes a few tries to add, I have to log in, and I don't get alerts! They need to pull this app!

What happened? I have used this app for years, and it was great. Always accurate and worked flawlessly. The recent update changed everything. Not only does it not track your flight anymore, it can't even find a flight. If you try to search for a flight, the app just freezes. Its completely useless. Plus, it's now full of ads that you are forced to wait to finish before you can even use the app. My recommendation, look elsewhere.

Big step backwards with latest release. Now you must sign up with username and password. Current flight that I'm tracking is almost at its destination but app status says it is "scheduled" and the map option shows it is still very close to origin when in fact it is about 700 miles away. Not sure if they changed the ads in any way yet. They were terrible prior - in many cases you had to completely exit the app. The one good thing is the trip function. You can make many trips with multiple flights

Data entry is much more difficult / time consuming than the previous version. Entering multiple flights for the same trip - the app (and the web site) makes you start over each time. The previous version allowed you to email an itinerary and automatically upload the flight info. That's gone now. Also I had paid for the previous one. Now it is a subscription model.

I've been using Flight view for what seems like fifteen years. all of a sudden it updated this weekend and lost almost all of my flights planned out for the rest of the year and when I tried adding this weekend's flights back, I received the email confirmation, but nothing showed up. it used to be the only reliable option for flight tracking and all of a sudden it doesn't work at all.

I honestly love this app except for not being able to delete past trips. I can only delete the flights within them. It would be 5 star for me otherwise. Update: Since the latest update, I can't do anything on this app. I can't save any flights for tracking at all now. This was my go-to app for tracking flights before, but I've deleted it now and will look for another. If you update again and return the flight tracking features, that can be saved again for me to follow, I'll reopen an account.

The new update is terrible. Been using this for years and now it's just beyond repair. It's got the strangest workflow to enter your trip that includes pop-up messages and the app saves your current trip as a past trip before your flight. Where are the notifications? I set up a test trip & never received any notification. They removed the information on the incoming flight. I don't like the design of it and I'm a paying subscriber. I'd say if it ain't broke don't fix it. Yrs of past trips GONE!

star_2.text: Forwarding itineraries to an email no longer does anything. Did not add info to the app or get an error. Saved some flights in the app and then tried to add to my calendar. Worked for one flight but no option to specify which calendar. Didn't work at all for the other flight (though the app says it was added). I've been using this app for years but this version seems to be a downgrade.

Agree with recent reviews. This was my go-to app for air travel, always accurate, great resource, but the ads are unbearable and often have been loud and disruptive with no option to turn off the sound. (embarrassing when traveling) I get creators need to get paid to keep it going, and I wouldn't mind the ads if I could turn off the sound AND they weren't so frequent. I would also pay a flat fee, but I'm not subscribing to another service I don't use frequently enough.

I don't trust it anymore. I've used FV for 8+ years. They keep rolling out new versions. More than once I have purchased the full version. My heavy travel schedule warranted it for the (sometimes) additional features and lack of ads. EVERY time the app eventually stops working. The old versions are then removed from the play store. Support doesn't help other than to point you to the new version. And look. Lo and behold, there is now a monthly subscription. No. I'll never sign up.

UPDATE 07/21/25: Woke up this a.m. to discover the FlightView App had been reconfigured, and maybe it's just "1st day jitters" but yesterday I had multiple flights under the "My Trips" in the app, and none of them migrated with the update. Also, I cannot add a flight to a trip today, and when I try to use the "Contact Support" option, it doe not allow me to send anything. Sadness. Stopping my subscription.

This latest version is a downgrade from previous great versions. Apart from now having to register and log in, some features are no longer available. For example, when checking if a flight is going to be delayed, there is no longer any information about the aircraft's previous flight. Also, when trying to check if an overnight flight from the US to the UK had landed, I could not select the previous day as the departure date.. I'm switching to another app if this doesn't get fixed properly

it's a decent app, but it'd be a lot better if you could save filtered searches (I'd assume with the no-ads subscription). I work on the ramp, so knowing when planes will arrive and depart our station, as well as knowing flights numbers and aircraft type, is imperative for my job; not having to change the filters every time would speed things up and make things much easier, and would definitely convince me to get a subscription, but at the moment, just ad removal isn't enough of an incentive.

Edit: Found replacement. The Flight Tracker $4.49. Flighview was great. Now ads are invasive. I buy most all apps, with the exception of subscription based apps. I hate subscription apps. A one time charge of $30? Sure. I've even paid $90 for an app I needed. There are other flight tracking apps out there though, that aren't subscription based. $18 a year for what every airline app provides free? Hmmm... I will look for another app before deciding to pay a subscription.

For years I loved this app - free, quick and easy way to find a flight and get a status update. This most recent update has rendered it pretty useless, certainly not "quicker" to use. It's always asking me to register aha log-in and there's no way to switch from finding a flight by number to route in the Track Flight page. I'll likely remove this one Go-to app now

no No NO, I can no longer recommend this app. For years I used the OAG FlightView Elite (paid version) with success, but it was no longer supported and updated. I received notice it would be soon fully retired and unusable, which means 'upgrading' to this version, which I did a trial run on and was very disappointed. Good things can't last forever and this is a clear example.

This used to be the best flight tracker but unfortunately it's not usable on my android. Its choppy, slow, freezes and takes forever for the keyboard to pop up and register key strokes. Not sure if this is happening all around but I have a newer android phone so I know the phone is not the issue. The app is the most current release as well.

this app went from 5 stars to 2 star very quick. latest update is terrible. my previous account is not able to be found and had to make a new one. the request a password feature didn't send out any emails. the create a trip button doesn't work. cant even click it. you have to click almost off the screen for it to work. cant seem to change the time in settings for airline flights from military to civilian. aircrafts previous flight is also gone too.. cant seem to do much of anything..

I've been using them for close to a year now. They've been perfect for me! *UPDATE* Was my favorite app that I used daily. I needed to constantly check the arrival flights and see any incoming flight delays, etc. I have an android, and it only says there are no incoming flights now. I know for a fact that's not true because I work at the busiest airport in the world (Atlanta), and we ALWAYS have incoming flights!! This is so frustrating....

I'm so sad. This was my absolute favorite app for tracking flights but the new UI is completely broken. Now it's laggy, I can't even click the button for searching a flight by route instead of number, it's forced into dark mode, the text is WAY too small, and the route map on the flights result doesn't even fit on the screen properly. It was perfect the way it was, I just don't understand this unnecessary change that made things nothing but worse.

Save flight and + button are broken. Same bugs others have mentioned. It appears this app is under new management and the devs or AI had broken it due lack of user testing. Shocked to see so many others with different bugs on the newer versions, for what was a reliable app. It's still sort of functional, but can just use ai-search instead since there's no value-add for this app due to broken functionality.

With the previous version, I paid for the Elite version, and it was great. Since the recent update, things just went really bad. The information is now not always accurate. Updates to flight status can sometimes take days. I am already on my third flight today and one of my flights from yesterday still shows "in air". I used to be able to see the duration of the flight, now I only see remaining time after the flight has started. And the full screen adds come at the most inconvenient times!!

Wanted to be notified of a friend's flight departing & landing. The app doesn't let you enable notifications for a given flight until you save it to a trip, which in turns requires an account... so okay, I create an account, save it to a new trip, and enable notifications for it. The flight passes by; no push notification. Nice.

This app used to be fantastic until they tried to update to a new system. It lost all tracking history for the past 10 years and now it will not send notifications for real time status updates. Not worth it anymore.

The app is good at tracking flights. However the way it treats ads is horrific. When an ad appears (and it's usually for another app) it's almost impossible to get rid of the ad without either downloading an app you don't want or to close the app and restart it. I would have given it 4 stars if it weren't for the horrible way it treats ads.

Overall appearance is great, what works that is. I want to upgrade but won't for 3 reasons. 1. £15.50 a year for what is a simple app is FAR too expensive, if it was £5, fair enough.. 2. Quite a few airline logos aren't there, despite some airlines having different codes/prefixes They should all tie in and show up. 3. It hasn't been updated since Feb, so that's not good. Makes me wonder if they've given up on it so why pay for something that's been abandoned? Fix these issues and I'll buy it.

They recently changed the app and no longer give the wheels down time but only give the same information as the airline which is estimated at the gate. Also you now have to reenter the flight information when switching between searching flights by flight number and cities or when checking back for updates. Used to say it was a 5 star app. Downgraded then to 2 stars. Very disappointed.

star_3.text: Was my Go-To app for two years in my flight tracking. Even paid so I could avoid the ads that so many reviews comment about. Recently, notifications has stopped working (Def the app, all other apps working fine) and those notifications were pretty important. Flightview is still great for gate information though. Have started to use FlightAware more, and it might become my primary app. FlightRadar24 is still the Gold Standard for in-air flight tracking in my opinion.

From 1 i am changing to 3 stars as the app's features are coming back little by little. one thing I miss is the weather temperature on the main flight info screen, is it possible to have that back as the old app had it, as well the altitude for flights? Thanks for keeping updating and getting better, take care.
I paid for flightview elite years ago. With this new version, I get ads and I can't get some of the video ads to stop. Please put back the elite version for which I paid.

Normally, I would give a better rating. I actually quite like this app, but when I've been trying to track a very common flight for two days already, arriving in a couple of days, and the app tells me that no such flight exists, it's extremely nerving. The flight does exist, and it shows on many other platforms, as well as a Google search. I think the app needs to be monitored more closely for bug fixes to avoid these types of issues.
Used to be much better. Somehow the save to calendar doesn't work as it used to do.

Been using this app at work for two years it was great for a while. I stopped using the app because unfortunately the ads got progressively worse. Usually I can handle a bit of annoyance for a free app but it became full screen ads with sound, then countdowns before close, and eventually countdowns with sound that make you confirm again to close after clicking the close and the exit out buttons were not responsive so I'm frantically clicking exit a lot because it doesn't read and it opens the ad

Ad's used to be ok. Last few months, so obnoxious I'm on verge of deleting. Nightmare to try to click through or back button. Any positive thought of ad is quickly replaced with thoughts of never using what's advertised and deleting this app. Stop forcing us to watch 20-30 seconds b4 we are forced to click to a second useless screen of ad or baited into what seems like a purchase screen.

The app USED to be my favorite tracking app for a whole host of reasons. HOWEVER, the recent so called update does NOT have any functionality as an app. The plus key won't add a flight. The Calendar keys won't change the date. And that's just the surface since I can't make the app do anything useful. The old version was amazing. This update is complete trash! I gave a 3 rating as a mixed bag rating in the hopes the developers get it fixed quickly. A 5 again if fixed, a 1 if not.

Great way to Track Flights. The only issue that persists is inability to delete a Trip. I can delete flights from a Trip, but the trip title persists. 5 stars when that gets fixed. Also paid for Elite version in the past. Now that version isn't available in my new Andriid phone.

Tons of commercials, super annoying. I paid for the ad free one a couple years ago, after about a year it kept freezing and not working. So now I use the regular one. So many advertisements You have to fight with it and close it then reopen to check your flight.

Still an excellent app, but could be a lot better. You can't change trip names once you save them. UI could use a full redesign. The ability to archive flights would be good. A better map would also help. I'm sticking with this app I have used for years, but the competition has surpassed it in a few areas.

Used to be the best flight tracker, but had had several updates. Still somewhat useful in it's ad-supported ("free") version, but each update seems like more ads and less app. I will probably just switch to the Google/Gmail tracking going forward.

Full screen ads that pop up when you're trying to decipher the complex info about the scheduled flight are undesirable. Full screen ads that pop up and disable the back button, less so. Free is free but this is rather overboard.

For the developer... I'm not sure how the system figures dates for flights that I send, but it's not only importing them wrong, if I take the time to manually correct the dates they don't stay corrected, they revert to wrong dates. Will this be fixed?

I really do like this app and it is very useful. Until recently I would have recommended it to anyone, but now with the new updates some things need to be figured out. I like that I didn't have to sign up for another app to be able to use it. Previously the map worked a whole lot better when you were tracking a flight. the map doesn't work for me at all now. For me that was the best feature. I will still use it but I'm looking for other options

Not sure about the yellow update, the flight number disappears once you have the info displayed and the "preferred airline" instead of just "airline" for those of us who use the app for work and use more than one airline is just a bit strange

I'm modifying my review and rating (1 Star to 3) for the latest update to the redesigned app (5.0.2). Much of the totally missing functionality in 5.0.0 appears to have been restored, but I won't be sure until I've had a week or so to test everything as I work. This app has been a vital tool in my business and that horrible first release was a nightmare to deal with. I'm hopeful that this latest update will make the app useful once again. I'll modify as needed. Galaxy S25U, S22+, Tab 9 FE.

Aug 22, 25: Updated app to 5.0.6. Adding trips and flights working. Continue to evaluate that all parts are working. Rating adj.To delete a specific flight, one needs to do this on the Trips page . Cannot delete flight on the Flight page. Delays are "as of" June 11. Airport delay map no data. Not updating. No flight map until flight active-not even proposed. Not helpful with no access in the air. Reg home airport (DFW) not showing in 'nearest' in app. Web & app no sync

I have used this app for years and it's been amazing. What's not amazing is it has been crashing for 2 days now and I can't use it at all. I had to download another one to track a needed flight today and I'm not happy. Please fix this!

This app used to work well, in fact it's how I keep track of my flights at work as it is typically the most accurate. The latest update has totally bricked it though! the app crashes on load, pretty disappointing.

star_4.text: Great app. Has all the info I need to track my son travels. Love it, please don't change a thing. .........This app was perfect! Now it doesn't do anything is supposed to do. No notifications . Info writes over lines. Bring back the perfect app please! .. 1/16/2026. App is a bit better but I still don't get any notifications which is important to me. why is it so difficult to fix that? Still missing the old app. Map stil not on real time or moving at all.. I must say this app has improved a lot!
Improved to four stars, as they seemed to have removed intrusive full screen ads

I was trying 3 different (popular) ones, that's the only app of them that offers notifications in the free version. Developers: please don't split airline and flight number. Also reduce the size of the app. It's too heavy.

(10/22/21 Issue resolved with a refund, thank you! I prefer having the paid ad-free version. Upon requesting email assistance, I did not receive a response for fixing the ad display problem.) 3 stars for unresolved ad issue 5 stars for expedited refund 4 stars overall - app tracking and features. I like Flightview and have relied on tracking flights for several years and paid to get rid of the ads. 😥

EDITED: The latest version (5.0.2) has reestablished tracking of flights that started a day before (wasn't the case in 5.0.1). Also limited data thus far, but it looks like tracking an aircraft's previous inbound flight isn't as common anymore. Past versions would have scored 5/5 from me, but this version is 4/5.

it was not easy to find our free flight tracker as an elderly woman but through it all i finally worked through it and was able to track my daughters trip so her young son could see it. i wish there was a way to have seen the time it actually landed, before having to go through the whole app again.

One of the better Live Flight Tracking applications I have come across. Expensive to purchase though, they should consider a price reduction for the premium version.... The free version is also fantastic, though - can't take that away from them.

I like the way this app finds most of the flights. Only one flight was not found and I guess the reason was it was a last minute added flight, the AC2004. Other apps had worst finding success. The only reason of 4 stars is the fact that there is no history list like in other similar apps, so every time I have enter all info even if I came back to check the status after 15 minutes.

Been using the app for years, very good app. Recent ads are excessive, that's true (like others stated). One bug recently reported through Feedback: Start date of trips on Android app has been messed up for months now. No matter how many times I fix it, it keeps overwriting every trip's start date with the current date. (The end date remains correct.) Please fix. Thanks!

Just updated mine 5.0.1 and reset password as instructed all trips are there and i can now move calendar days for new trips. seems to be doing pretty good. sent new travel to trips@.... got email saying it's there but can't see it yet. Will see after overnight and write new review. You must update and reset password!! UPDATE: Still only able to add trips from web version and not the app Can't add itinerary from trips@... After adding fom web they are visible on app.

Really like this app. It's easy to use and has been very accurate. My only complaint is that I'm not able to delete previous trips from the Trips section. I've tried both methods offered in the Help section, but nothing is ever actually deleted.

My goto flight tracking app. Love that you moved the Nav Bar. Handles storing, sorting and retrieving fast & easy. Would like to see a search of the trip name added to quickly find a saved trip or saved trip folder. Like that I can use airline code followed by flight number as shortcut in the flight number field.

appears to be working well again for the moment. updated stars. old issue. used this app for years. currently broken, can't add trips, can't change flight date when you look one up. buttons are just broken atm. used to work great.
Really like the App. The other App I have doesn't show altitude and speed, like this one does. But under 'trips', the 3 filters by status do not work well. Hopefully, they can fix that.

The app is finally working better after the last update. I have been using this app for almost 10 years and I really miss the home screen widget. I'm hoping it gets brought back soon since it made it easy to get a quick glance at my upcoming flight info.

The app has been great for years. Then suddenly I open the app and three years of flight history ( used for taxes) is gone. I have to log in, which was unusual too. It acted as if this was the first time using. So apparently it did a major reset. Sigh.

Used this app for years and love it but I can't delete saved trips. ii can delete the actual old flights but the old trip name stay. so I have a bunch of old trip names in there that I can't delete and it's annoying. But everything else about the app is awesome

Have used this app for years. Recent update caused app failed to open. Uninstall and reinstall did not help. In Phone app settings, deleted app data and cache. then unistall and reinstall. Works perfectly again. Hope this helps others.
Everything works pretty well! Gets all the info I need and the interface is simple and navigable. The only issue I have is I cannot delete certain old trips I've created. Otherwise, app works great!
Was a great app until the last update. All my past and current trips are gone and I cannot add anything now, since "+" button no longer works. It is the same for my phone and tablet.

star_5.text: So, I just needed an app for one flight. The first 2 I downloaded wanted to bait me into signing up with a free trial. I hate those. So i just went down the list and downloaded every app, hoping to find one that just let me check a flight for free. This was the only one that was free and functioned that I found, from 6 or 7 apps. Served its purpose for me, which is to look up a flight once a year.

Considering that Air NZ has let me down so many times when it comes to flight information I've turned to this free app. Easy to use and can put together trip information from various airlines! Unlike the Star Alliance or One World apps, including Air NZ and Qantas, I can put them together and even add Scoot and Alaska! Hope they don't change the useful free app. I have noticed that some people complain about the pop up ads. For me after dealing with Air NZ's Oscar, this is nothing. Just close.

Really like this flight tracker. Very easy to use and simple. It's been my go to flight tracking app since 2013. I like how you can save the trips you're tracking and the notifications. The map tracker too. Sometimes get the information faster than the actual airlines apps. Would like to see less long ads but understand they're needed. Pixel 8 Pro
The latest update fixed all the issues for me , including the notifications.

This app has been working very well until the last couple weeks. Today the date is all messed up. 13 flights I have in the system are all screwed up. Might have to look for another app. Thank you! That version has corrected that issue! Now when I delete an entry the personal info keeps reappearing causing me to delete multiple times. Thanks. Guys what's going on with your app? Stopping continues all the time? I really do like the app! Please add back the notices!

I always use this app to track my flights and especially watch the plane on previous flights to help determine if mine will be on time. It's accurate and fast! I watched a plane park at the gate and seconds after the jet way stopped there app alerted me the flight had arrived.

I always track my flights using this app, including flights for others that affect me. I also appreciate being able to check status of previous flights with a single click and to set notifications for them to be sure everything is running as scheduled. Naming flights and saving them to trip "folders" keeps me organized as well. This is a great app for anyone who flies a lot and wants organized access to flights in one app!

Love this App. I use it constantly to track flights and plan airport pickups for friends and family. Much more accurate and timely than the airline's tracker. I had times when the airline sent an alert that a flight had landed after we were already in the car on our way home! edit- July 25 latest version: date functionality does not work so can't search for a flight. all my data of flights that were set for tracking - gone. now unable to track flights for guests arriving tomorrow Disappointed

Aside from the ads, this app is great and features real time data that often alerts me well before my airline will. I always use it to track my flights the day of travel in case of any changes. I love the ETA for tracking incoming flights so I can time my arrival to the airport better when picking up friends or family. This has been a life saver!

Some previous versions had bad bugs on Android 9 and 10 where each trip would be added multiple times. The recent bugfix corrects that. This is the only flight tracker I've found that shows an aircraft's inbound/previous flight, this is very useful when you want to find out if your flight is going to be late.

Please, please roll back the previous version! Flightview WAS the BEST of all flight tracking apps before this update. I was able to keep a record of ALL travel history for the past 15 years! It was smart, user friendly, and received timely gate changes. Please bring back the previous version. I paid for the elite version 15 years ago, but somehow the lines got blurred between free and elite version on Play Store. So I was stuck with watching ads. Nevertheless, it worked flawless!

Of all the apps I use for travel, this one is the most reliable. There have been many times where this app has updated with delay or gate info ahead of the airline app. In Gatwick, the airport employee was confused my app had updates before his own device. One time it was easy to determine, based on the ripple effect of delays from the plane's previous flights, that my flight was easily going to be 2 hours late at minimum, which helped when travelling with a 3 year old.

I have been using it for years and I love it. I don't travel that much but do use it to keep track of the flights of my children as well as my own. It's great when I am picking them up and the flight is delayed (or even cancelled) as well as when I am dropping them off, or even when they are returning home (and again when the flight is delayed or cancelled). I have called them when they were away and told them about delays or cancelations even before they were notified by the airlines.

One of the must have apps. I've used the others but this one just seems to deliver the info the way I need. Caution, turn off notifications unless you want to be woken at 3 in the morning when they start tracking a flight 😊
simple, clean, works. ads are non intrusive. great all around service.
Definitely my pick for flight tracking. I've been using this one for a few years. Easy to use interface and notifications of arrivals, on ground, departures, in air, etc are always timely.

I'm rating this very important app that I use for work a 1 Star because as of yesterday since I have updated it is not opening and continuously crashing over and over. I need this app to work on my phone again very soon, once it does that, I'll give it the right rating, 5 stars. Update: it works as advertised again. BACK TO 5 STARS!!

It's a little clunky at first until you figure out how to use it, but it accomplishes its task. You get updates faster than anyone else when tracking flights. great when tracking flights with different airlines.

This has worked every time I've used it. You must have all the info at hand, pay attention to the prompts and it works. It's great to keep track of when you are expecting someone coming so you know when to leave for the airport. And I've used it to follow a loved one to watch them get to their destination.

Very useful app, but I do have an issue with deleting trips. I can create new ones and add and remove flights at will, but when I try to delete a trip, it just doesn't disappear. Edit 12/22/2022: They have resolved this issue!
